summary: A romantic letter web app styled as an animated parchment scroll. Features an entry screen with an 'Open My Heart' button, animated scroll unrolling effect, parchment-textured letter with love message and exam encouragement note for Priya, and a close/roll-back button. Uses Dancing Script, Cinzel, and Great Vibes Google Fonts with a dark background theme.
architectural_notes: Single HTML file app with embedded CSS and JS — no external dependencies except Google Fonts and a transparent texture image
Two-screen flow: entry screen with button → animated parchment scroll reveal → letter content with close button
Parchment scroll animation uses CSS height transition (0 to 75vh) with content fade-in delayed by 1.2s

existing_features.title: Rebuild the frontend to match the provided HTML design exactly: a dark (#121212) background entry screen with a parchment-styled 'Open My Heart ❤️' button (Cinzel font, gold border, rounded pill shape with hover scale/rotate effect). Clicking it hides the entry screen and reveals the scroll.

Implement the animated parchment scroll UI: two wooden-style brown roll handles (gradient, rounded, with 🕯️ candle decorations at each end), and a parchment body between them that animates from height 0 to 75vh over 1.8s with a cubic-bezier easing when opened. The parchment uses background color #f4e4bc with a paper-fibers texture overlay, gold left/right borders, and inner shadow.

Render the letter content inside the parchment scroll. The content fades in (opacity 0 to 1) after a 1.2s delay once the scroll is open. Content includes: Great Vibes font h1 title 'To My Most Special Person 🌹' in red (#d42424); six body paragraphs in Dancing Script at 1.4rem; a gold horizontal rule separator; a highlighted exam note section with class 'highlight' in bold red (#b52b2b) at 1.5rem; and a 'Roll Back & Close 📜' button that reverses the scroll animation and returns to the entry screen.
Load Google Fonts: Dancing Script (weight 600), Cinzel (weights 400 and 700), and Great Vibes from fonts.googleapis.com, and apply them consistently across all UI elements as in the provided design.
Set the page title to 'A Message for the Most Special Person ✨' and ensure the app is fully responsive with no horizontal overflow, using overflow-x: hidden on the body.

projectName: A Message for the Most Special Person
